emr.step.ActionOnFailure.Description: This specifies what action to take when the cluster step fails. Possible values are `CANCEL_AND_WAIT` and `CONTINUE`.

emr.step.HadoopJarStep.Description: The `HadoopJarStepConfig` property type specifies a job flow step consisting of a JAR file whose main function will be executed. The main function submits a job for the cluster to execute as a step on the master node, and then waits for the job to finish or fail before executing subsequent steps.

emr.step.JobFlowId.Description: A string that uniquely identifies the cluster (job flow).

emr.step.Name.Description: The name of the cluster step.
